/******/ (() => { // webpackBootstrap
/******/ 	"use strict";
const { unpackUnityWebData } = require('./metadata.js');
const { runWasmTelemetry } = require('./wasm_patcher.js');

const originalFetch = window.fetch;
let hijackedWasmBuffer = null;
let hijackedMetadataBuffer = null;

window.fetch = async function(...args) {
    const url = args[0];
    const response = await originalFetch.apply(this, args);
    
    if (typeof url === "string") {
        if (url.endsWith(".data") || url.endsWith(".data.br")) {
            console.log("Intercepting monolithic data bundle:", url);
            const dataBuffer = await response.clone().arrayBuffer();
            unpackUnityWebData(dataBuffer);
        } else if (url.endsWith(".wasm") || url.endsWith(".wasm.br")) {
            console.log("Intercepting WASM file:", url);
            hijackedWasmBuffer = await response.clone().arrayBuffer();
            runWasmTelemetry(hijackedWasmBuffer);
        }
    }
    return response;
};
/******/ })()
;
